items: Treat ContinuousEffectDescriptor DP/SecurityAttack/SecurityDigimonDP runtime reuse as candidate only after TRUST-001 maps it back to ChangeDP/ChangeSAttack/ChangeCardDP/ChangeOriginDP evidence.
